zh.Thatcham, Berkshire, England, United Kin: 英國英格蘭波克夏塔其哈姆
zh.Horsham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭素可霍沙安
zh.Thatcham, West Berkshire Unitary Authori: 英國英格蘭波克夏塔其哈姆
zh.London Saint Botolph Aldersgate, Middles: 英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 波托爾福 阿爾德斯蓋特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery於1554年出生在英國英格蘭波克夏塔其哈姆時，她的父親Michael Berwick22歲，母親Katherine Barbara Jennings30歲。她於1575年與Francis Bushnell Sr of Thatcham在英國英格蘭波克夏塔其哈姆結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1625年8月15日之前在英國波克夏塔其哈姆。

zh-hans.Thatcham, Berkshire, England, United Kin: 英国英格兰波克夏塔其哈姆
zh-hans.Horsham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰素可霍沙安
zh-hans.Thatcham, West Berkshire Unitary Authori: 英国英格兰波克夏塔其哈姆
zh-hans.London Saint Botolph Aldersgate, Middles: 英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 波托爾福 阿爾德斯蓋特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery于1554年出生在英国英格兰波克夏塔其哈姆时，她的父亲Michael Berwick22岁，母亲Katherine Barbara Jennings30岁。她于1575年与Francis Bushnell Sr of Thatcham在英国英格兰波克夏塔其哈姆结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1625年8月15日之前在英国波克夏塔其哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Margery was born in 1554, in Thatcham, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Michael Berwick, was 22 and her mother, Katherine Barbara Jennings, was 30. She married Francis Bushnell Sr of Thatcham in 1575, in Thatcham, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 4 daughters. She died before 15 August 1625, in Thatcham, Berkshire, England.

fr.London Saint Botolph Aldersgate, Middles: London Saint Botolph Aldersgate, Middlesex, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery est née en 1554, à Thatcham, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Michael Berwick, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Katherine Barbara Jennings, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Francis Bushnell Sr of Thatcham en 1575, à Thatcham, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée avant 15 août 1625, à Thatcham, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.London Saint Botolph Aldersgate, Middles: London Saint Botolph Aldersgate, Middlesex, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Margery 1554 in Thatcham, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Michael Berwick 22 und ihre Mutter Katherine Barbara Jennings 30. Sie hat 1575 in Thatcham, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom Francis Bushnell Sr of Thatcham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb vor 15. August 1625 in Thatcham, Berkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery è nata il nel 1554 nel Thatcham, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Michael Berwick, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Katherine Barbara Jennings, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Francis Bushnell Sr of Thatcham nel 1575, nel Thatcham, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 4 figlie. Morì prima del 15 agosto 1625, nel Thatcham, Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margeryが1554年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアサトチャムで生まれた時，父Michael Berwickは22歳，母Katherine Barbara Jenningsは30歳であった。1575年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアサトチャムでFrancis Bushnell Sr of Thatchamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1625年8月15日以前にイギリスバークシュアイアサトチャムで死去した。

ko.London Saint Botolph Aldersgate, Middles: 영국 미들레세스 런던 세인트 벗프 알더스가트
ko.lifeSummary: Margery(이)가 1554년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 댓챔에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Michael Berwick(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Barbara Jennings(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1575년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 댓챔에서 Francis Bushnell Sr of Thatcham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1625년 8월 15일 이전 영국 버크실르 댓챔에서 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Francis Bushnell Sr of Thatcham em 1575, em Thatcham, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.London Saint Botolph Aldersgate, Middles: лондон сеинт ботолф алдирсгэит, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery родилась в 1554 г. в местности тачам, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Michael Berwick было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine Barbara Jennings, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Francis Bushnell Sr of Thatcham в 1575 г. в местности тачам, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла перед 15 августа 1625 г. в местности тачам, биркшир, Англия.

Se casó con Francis Bushnell Sr of Thatcham en 1575, en Thatcham, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió antes de 15 de agosto de 1625, en Thatcham, Berkshire, Inglaterra.
